programmes.show_description: Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
Melodic synths, pumping beats and shout out loud lyrics. Live your best life with some Eurodance NRG!
As the end of the decade approaches, Tulisa looks back and picks 25 anthems of the 2010s. Including Sigala, Galantis and Clean Bandit.
We give you heavy hits, vocal anthems, dirty beats and bangin' basslines. This is the 2010s at it finest!
It's the early 90s and Judge Jules has hand picked 20 huge vocal anthems. The ladies lead the way with some proper sing-out-loud belters from back in the day!
Let's go way back with some classic throwback hits, long forgotten beats and some good old fashioned rave anthems!
The late 80s and early 90s: the authorities hated it, the media attacked it, but the people loved it!
From the fields to the clubs! Relive the rave culture with iconic tracks that defined a generation. Pure energy and essential anthems only. Ravers Unite!
Superstar DJ Judge Jules passes Judgement on the state of dance music. Today he's putting the case forward for which is the best 90s dance tune of all time!
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
Join Nick Chicane for a deep dive into Balearic Beats. From day parties at Space to Cafe Del Mar sunsets and pulsing nights at Privilege revisit the tunes that defined an era.
Dive into a world of uplifting melodies, driving beats and breakdowns to give you shivers! This is Euphoria at its finest.
A collaboration only the dance gods could have forged. Join DJ royalty Axwell, Steve Angello, & Sebastian Ingrosso for a definitive collection of Swedish House Mafia's best videos
We give you heavy hits, vocal anthems, dirty beats and bangin' basslines. This is the 2010s at it finest!
Join Kevin and Perry as they get ready for a massive night out. With their huge party anthems, banging tunes and floor filling favs!

programmes.show_name: 35 Years Ago! Wow Feeling Old Yet?
programmes.show_description: 35 years in the making, these are the biggest tracks from 1991. Expect Rozalla, 2 Unlimited, C&C Music Factory and the KLF boys! Feeling old yet?
Everybody's free to feel good and Rozalla knows it! So let's join her as she takes us on a journey of her 40 favourite feel good anthems from back in the day.

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!

programmes.show_name: 15 Years Ago! Wow Feeling Old Yet?
programmes.show_description: 2011 gave us some awesome tracks including hits from Avicii, Guetta, Calvin Harris, Example and a load more! Were these all really 15 years ago?
